services.description: Central API gateway that handles all inbound HTTP traffic. Routes requests to downstream services based on path. Handles authentication, rate limiting, and request tracing. Built in Go.
known_failure_modes: Rate limiter misconfiguration causes legitimate traffic to be blocked
Upstream timeout settings too aggressive cause premature failures
Memory leak in connection pooling under sustained high load

services.description: Processes all payment transactions. Integrates with external payment processors. Handles refunds, chargebacks, and payment status webhooks. Writes transaction records to PostgreSQL. Strict consistency requirements — all operations are transactional. Built in Java/Spring.
known_failure_modes: DB connection pool exhaustion under high transaction volume
External payment processor timeouts cause latency spikes
Redis cache miss storms after restart cause DB overload
JVM GC pauses at high memory utilization

services.description: Manages the full order lifecycle: creation, validation, fulfillment, and cancellation. Orchestrates calls to payment-service and inventory-service. Publishes order events to Kafka for downstream consumers (notification-service). Built in Python/FastAPI.
known_failure_modes: Cascade failure when payment-service is slow — order-service holds DB transactions open waiting
Kafka consumer lag accumulates during high order volumes
Inventory service timeouts cause order validation to fail
Synchronous payment call blocks thread pool under load

services.description: Manages user accounts, profiles, authentication tokens, and preferences. Serves as the identity source of truth. High read rate (every authenticated request touches this service). Redis-cached for performance. Built in Node.js.
known_failure_modes: Redis cache eviction on restart causes DB read storm
JWT token validation memory leak under sustained load
Node.js event loop blocking on synchronous crypto operations

services.description: Consumes order events from Kafka and sends email/SMS/push notifications to users. Stateless beyond Kafka consumer state. Does not write to any database. Built in Python.
known_failure_modes: Memory leak in email template rendering under high notification volume
Kafka consumer lag accumulates when SMTP provider is slow
Consumer group rebalance during deployment causes message replay

services.description: Manages product inventory levels, reservations, and stock adjustments. Called synchronously by order-service during order validation. High consistency requirements for stock counts. Built in Go.
known_failure_modes: Row-level lock contention during flash sales causes severe latency spikes
DB connection pool exhaustion during order burst
Cascade from postgres slowness affecting all write operations
